headline: Judah Spinner Increases BlackBird Financial's Stake in Builders FirstSource by 900%
summary: The building materials giant is now BlackBird Financial's largest position.TOMS RIVER, NEW JERSEY, March 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Judah Spinner, founder of BlackBird Financial, today announced that it has increased its investment in Builders FirstSource by a dramatic 900%, capitalizing on the stock's sharp decline amid persistent weakness in the U.S. housing market.
